title: Create board from template - automation failing
excerpt:
Anyone else now having trouble creating a board from a template using an automation?  We’ve had no issues using the automation below until recently. 
 
From the last run:

posts.author: DelBocaVista (Marty Fishdog)
posts.cookedHtml:
Anyone else now having trouble creating a board from a template using an automation? We’ve had no issues using the automation below until recently.

From the last run:

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Could it be that your template contains a connect_boards column? There has been a recent change with board creation from automations where it fails when you reach the maximum number of board connections.

posts.author: DelBocaVista (Marty Fishdog)
posts.cookedHtml: It does contain a connect boards column, however, the column on the template board is only connected to 3 other boards.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: So, every time you create a board from that template the overall count for connected board is increased by 3. This might very well be the issue. I would delete the connected boards column (or disconnect the boards) temporarily in the template and try again.

posts.author: DelBocaVista (Marty Fishdog)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s correct. I suspected I may be reaching a limit that I wasn’t aware of. Is the new max number of board connections a total across the account or connections per board?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
